market_pulse: EDC Week dominates nightlife engagement across major venues; LIV capturing strong talent lineup (Tiësto, David Guetta, Dom Dolla) while competitors double down on brand experiences and user-generated content.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Multiple A-list DJs booked across all major venues
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize tonight's David Guetta set and tomorrow's lineup promotion; consider flash offer on bottle service for early bookings.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Zouk, OMNIA) using remixed EDM mashups with heavy bass drops; LIV posts use clean artist mixes without dynamic audio layering.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 Reels using trending TikTok/IG audio with heavy bass remixes; pair with talent announcements for higher engagement.

content_gaps.description: Encore and OMNIA posting frequent BTS content (artist prep, setup, crowd moments); LIV's feed is talent-announcement focused.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch weekly BTS Stories series showing DJ prep, VIP table setup, and crowd energy during peak hours.

content_gaps.description: XS and Zouk showing high UGC repost rates; minimal hashtag strategy visible on LIV accounts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create #LIVEDCWeek campaign; offer raffle entries for tagged posts; repost 2-3 UGC posts daily.

influencer_activity.mention: John Summit residency at LIV Beach continues strong; mentioned in multiple TikTok videos about dayclub experiences.
Tiësto appears in LIV's EDC Week lineup (May 15); also major presence at Encore Beach Club and TAO Beach.
David Guetta headline tonight (May 18) at LIV Nightclub; also scheduled at LIV Beach and Encore.
Discolines at LIV Beach (May 15) generating significant TikTok engagement with poolside content.
Steve Aoki is booked at both Palm Tree Beach Club and Encore Beach Club this weekend.

story_activity.summary: EDC Week talent lineup posted May 13-18 with daily DJ rotations (Josh Baker B2B Kettama, Dom Dolla, Tiësto, Four Color Zack, David Guetta).
EDC Week dayclub schedule posted for May 14-17 with talent (Knock2, Discolines, David Guetta, John Summit).
Weekend headliners for May 14-18: Subtronics, Gryffin, Calvin Harris, Marshmello lineup active.
Mid-week to weekend schedule active: Ray Volpe (5/13), James Hype + Meduza (5/14), Wax Motif (5/15), DJ Baby Face NYC + DJ Adoni (5/17).

venues.summary: Strong EDC Week presence; Major talent lineup (Tiësto, David Guetta); High engagement on Instagram with 88K followers and active Stories.

raw_posts.content_summary: EDC Week schedule posted with daily DJ rotations May 13-18. Josh Baker B2B Kettama B2B Prospa (Wed 5/13), Dom Dolla (Thu 5/14), Tiësto (Fri 5/15), Four Color Zack (Sat 5/16), David Guetta (Mon 5/18).
User-generated content showing John Summit residency at LIV Beach with attendee outfits and spring break vibes.
Main LIV Las Vegas account (@livlv) showing EDC Week emphasis with hashtag #EDCWEEK🪩 and full artist lineup.
Event calendar page active with full 2026 lineup showcasing premiere nightclub status on the Strip.

venues.summary: Day-life oasis positioning strong; EDC Week dayclub lineup active; John Summit residency; 40K followers with solid engagement.

raw_posts.content_summary: EDC Week dayclub schedule posted: Knock2 (Thu 5/14), Discolines (Fri 5/15), David Guetta (Sat 5/16), John Summit (Sun 5/17).
Multiple user-generated videos of attendees in beach club attire, dancing, and celebrating; Discolines content showing strong organic reach.
Brand positioning as 'all-new day life oasis' with sun emoji and luxury daylife aesthetic appeal.

venues.summary: Massive Instagram presence (304K followers, 4,210 posts); User-generated content strategy strong; Dress code/outfit guides dominant.

raw_posts.content_summary: Established major presence with 304K followers; Consistent posting of event lineups and nightclub experiences.
Dress code guides and outfit inspiration content heavily featured; High engagement on fashion-focused UGC.

venues.summary: 282K Instagram followers; Strong weekend talent lineup (Calvin Harris, Marshmello); Heavy emphasis on pool experience content.

raw_posts.content_summary: Weekend dayclub headliners announced: Subtronics (5/14), Gryffin (5/15), Calvin Harris (5/16), Marshmello (5/17), with continuation through 5/18.
Pool party and golden hour photography content; Strong engagement on beach/dayclub aesthetic.
Located at Wynn Las Vegas; Emphasis on luxury dayclub positioning and VIP bottle service.

venues.summary: 463K Instagram followers (largest nightclub following); May lineup showing emphasis on Latin/house diversity (DeOro, Cedric Gervais, Deseo Sundays).

raw_posts.content_summary: May talent lineup posted: YoYoLie (5/5), DeOro (5/8), Cedric Gervais (5/9), Mikey Francis with DJ Tao Concept (5/12); includes Deseo Latin Sundays programming.
Chandelier visual content and dress code guides heavily featured; High engagement on venue architecture content.
Tao Group Hospitality concept branding at Caesars Palace; Large follower base (463K) showing premium positioning.

venues.summary: Newer dayclub concept (32 posts); Weekend talent for EDC Week (Follow the Fish, Rufus Du Sol, Martin Garrix); 247K followers.

raw_posts.content_summary: EDC Week dayclub schedule: Follow the Fish (5/15), Rufus Du Sol DJ set (5/16), Martin Garrix (5/17); Tao Group concept at Caesars Palace.
Newer venue emphasizing skybar experience and panoramic Vegas views; Limited post history but strong follower engagement.

venues.summary: 248K Instagram followers; EDC Week programming strong (Ray Volpe, James Hype + Meduza, Wax Motif, Baby Face NYC); High UGC engagement.

raw_posts.content_summary: EDC Week schedule: Ray Volpe (5/13), James Hype + Meduza (5/14), Wax Motif (5/15), DJ Baby Face NYC + DJ Adoni (5/17); emphasis on tech-house/bass genres.
Dress code guides and venue tour content; High engagement on fashion and experience-focused UGC.
Events page showing full calendar integration; Resorts World Las Vegas location positioning.

venues.summary: 255K Instagram followers; R&Bae Wednesdays programming; May schedule shows diverse talent (Laid Back Luke, Four Color Zack, Justin Credible).

Dress code and outfit inspiration content; Occasional artist/performance highlights; R&Bae Wednesday programming visibility.

venues.venue: Palm Tree Beach Club (The Venetian/MGM Grand)
venues.summary: Newer luxury daylife destination (38 posts); 232K followers; Weekend talent includes Steve Aoki; Limited history but strong positioning.

raw_posts.content_summary: Luxury daylife positioning with weekend schedule: Steve Aoki (Sat), DJ Lema (Sun); Tao Group Hospitality x Palm Tree Crew collaboration; Wednesday-Sunday operations.
Brand emphasis on 'Vegas' luxury daylife destination' with high-end aesthetic and VIP-focused content.

venues.summary: 93K Instagram followers; Strong EDC Week presence (Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki); TikTok engagement high with rooftop pool positioning.

Rooftop pool experience content; User-generated dayclub videos showing high engagement; Luxury positioning in organic content.
